title: The Sun is Conscious? Rupert Sheldrake Explains
summary: This interview excerpt features a discussion about the possibility of solar consciousness, exploring how the sun's electromagnetic field could serve as an interface for consciousness and how such a conscious sun might influence phenomena like solar flares and coronal mass ejections.

events.description: The Carrington Event - a major solar storm that affected Earth

key_claims.claim: If the sun is conscious, its electromagnetic field could provide an interface for that consciousness
A conscious sun could potentially influence the direction of solar flares and coronal mass ejections
The sun has an 11-year cycle of activity with increased sunspots and solar flares in the middle of the cycle
Solar flares directed at Earth could take out power systems, similar to the Carrington Event of 1859
